text: A pizza is cut into 4 equal slices. Sam eats 1 slice. What fraction of the pizza did Sam eat?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: The pizza is cut into 4 equal slices, so each slice is 1 out of 4 equal parts.
Step 2: Sam eats 1 slice out of the 4 slices.
Step 3: This means Sam ate 1/4 of the pizza.
The correct answer is 1/4.
